objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=50)
- adx(period=22)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 30
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 30
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, donchian.middle) or adx.adx < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.0
tp_atr_mult: 4.0
description: ATR stop-loss (2.0x) and take-profit (4.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Using a breakout strategy with Donchian channel and ADX to identify trending markets along with ATR based risk management for more robust trade entries.
Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

pre_reflection.text: [Pre-reflection] The strategy is based on two indicators, Donchian Channels and Average Directional Index (ADX), to generate buy signals. The stop loss will be set at 2 times the Average True Range (ATR) and take profit at 4 times ATR. The strategy also takes into account a cross over of close price with the middle band of the Donchian channel. If results are poor, I would consider reducing the period for these indicators or adjusting the risk parameters. In case of mediocre performance, I might experiment with other combinations of moving averages and look at other timeframes as well. For an alternative approach if current one fails, I could try a different trend following strategy using more momentum based indicators like RSI or MACD.

iterations.hypothesis: Un ensemble de combinaisons des indicators FND, ATR, RSI et Bollinger Band permettra d'améliorer les performances du trading.
